chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-1427 of 2022 _______________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For order on CMA No.1475/2023 2. For order on CMA No.20080/2022 3. For order on CMA No.20081/2022 4. For order on CMA No.12493/2022 5. For hearing of Misc. No.12316/2022 6. For hearing of Misc. No.12491/2022 7. For hearing of Misc. No.12492/2022 8. For hearing of CMA No.7437/2022 9. For order as to maintainability of instant petition 13.08.2025 Mr. Sandeep Malani, AAG --------- This is an old petition of 2022, which is over 03 years ago. It was last taken up on 11.05.2022, which is over 03 years ago. In the last 03 years, learned counsel for the petitioners has made no serious efforts to pursue this old petition. Prima facie, the petition appears to suffer from laches and the question of maintainability has still not been addressed. Today, despite the lapse of 03 years, learned counsel for the petitioners is called absent without any intimation. It appears that the petitioners have lost interest in pursuing this matter. Accordingly, the petition is dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith pending application(s). Head of Const. Benches Judge Nadir*
